hooks.command: if ! git -C "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" diff --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null || ! git -C "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then echo '{"systemMessage": "Version reminder: every commit must bump the version number in index.html. The pre-commit hook (.git/hooks/pre-commit) handles this automatically — it increments the patch version (e.g. v1.0 \u2192 v1.0.1) on every git commit."}'; fi
